description: Interactive single-file research tools for the AI-datacenter capex cycle and quant strategy modeling. Educational only — not investment advice.

tools.title: AI Capex Strategy Lab
tools.blurb: Model US/CAD equity & ETF-proxy strategies across the AI-datacenter supply chain with per-horizon playbooks (1M/3M/6M/1Y), a 5-objective optimizer, theme-aware correlation, and a lognormal risk model.
